migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
title: CC grader answer key
description: The isolated answer key for one bank item. Lives in a grader-only store (spine/gold/answer-keys.json), never in a learner-facing item file. The quiz engine's learner view resolves an item WITHOUT touching this store; only the grader/validator context reads it. Added PR-8a with the quiz engine and the answer_key_isolation_guard flip to active.

answer_key_ref.description: Matches the referencing item's answer_key_ref. Convention: <item_id>.key

item_id.description: The item this key grades. answer_key_ref must equal item_id + '.key'.

correct_index.description: Zero-based index into the item's choices array identifying the correct option.

rationale_refs.description: fact_ids that justify why the correct option is correct. Must be a subset of the item's fact_ids (checked by validate_gold).

distractor_misconceptions.description: Maps a choice index (as a string) to the misconception taxonomy tag its distractor targets. Feeds the wrong-answer journal; enum mirrors bank-item.schema.json misconception_tags.

answer_key_hash.description: sha256 of item_id + unit-separator + correct-choice text. Recomputed by validate_gold from the live item; a mismatch means the item's choices drifted out from under the key.
